initiatives.name: Central Oregon Peace Keepers
initiatives.description: The Peacekeepers are BIPOC led & are dedicated to the safety of the Central Oregon activist community

initiatives.name: Bend Pride
initiatives.description: We believe that by working together, we can make a positive difference in the lives of BIPOC & 2SLGBTQIA+ individuals and help build a more self aware, responsible, impactful and compassionate society for all.

initiatives.name: Deschutes Youth Climate Coalition
initiatives.description: Fighting for climate action in Central Oregon. Part of the global School Strike for Climate movement.

initiatives.name: Central Oregon for Socialism
initiatives.description: Community based in Central Oregon seeking to empower the working class through mutual aid, skill-building, and facilitation of decolonial dialogue.

initiatives.name:
Central Oregon Students for a Democratic
              Society
initiatives.description: We're rejecting the status quo and embracing political optimism! Have the courage to take action once and for all and join our struggle!

initiatives.name: Jewish Voice for Peace Bend
initiatives.description: Jews and Palestinian allies of Central Oregon organizing towards Palestinian liberation and Judaism beyond Zionism

initiatives.name: Central Oregon for a Free Palestine
initiatives.description: We are a Palestinian-led group of Central Oregonians who seek to educate, organize, and mobilize our community in service of Palestinian liberation.

initiatives.name: Fridays for Future Bend
initiatives.description: Youth led climate action organization! We need everyone in order to tackle the climate crisis. DM us to help organize actions

initiatives.name: Bend Equity Project
initiatives.description: We are a local mutual aid group that exchanges and redistributes resources to those with the greatest need in our community.
